title: Encountered Internal server error when trying to upload a file through query

posts.author: felizgata (HUIFANG GU)
posts.cookedHtml:
In my app, I have set up the sdk with the right token, I can make other query, however When I try to upload a file to a column on a board, it hits an internal server error.
my code as following:

 const file = await fetch('/images/test.pdf').then(r => r.arrayBuffer());

console.log(file)
const query = mutation {add_file_to_column (item_id: 1844256842, column_id: "files", file: ${file}) {id}}

  try{
    const response = await monday.api(query)
    console.log(24, response)
    
  }catch(e){
    console.log(e)
  }

error message as follow

Screenshot 2024-02-26 at 9.39.02 am1360×440 237 KB

Screenshot 2024-02-26 at 9.39.14 am1360×440 71 KB

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
What does the status page say?

Is there an outage in the APIs at this moment?

posts.author: felizgata (HUIFANG GU)
posts.cookedHtml: I clicked the status page, it just says “This content is blocked. Contact the site owner to fix the issue.”

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah, you’re trying to open a status page in an iframe and the CSP breaks that. Open the link in a new browser window/tab

posts.author: felizgata (HUIFANG GU)
posts.cookedHtml:
it leads me to a general status page

Screenshot 2024-02-28 at 2.08.17 pm1893×1082 185 KB

posts.cookedHtml: Same problem here, did you manage to fix it?
